ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] (New Testament) Begin working on a "picture biography" of Jesus using your own brush drawings or fine art prints.
[ ] (New Testament) Act out one of the miracles of Jesus.

[ ] (New Testament) Continue working on a "picture biography" of Jesus using your own brush drawings or fine art prints.
[ ] (New Testament) Act out one of the miracles of Jesus.
[ ] (New Testament) Visit a museum of antiquities to see artifacts from the time of Christ.
[ ] (New Testament) Learn the names of the books of the Bible. ["The Best Books of the Bible"](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=powlzb2Rfdw&ab_channel=JumpStart3) song can help.

[ ] (New Testament) Take a [virtual tour of Biblical sites](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Nl5DNKf0mFw&t=13s&ab_channel=JohnDeLancey) in Israel. How many do you recognize from this year's readings?
[ ] (New Testament) Visit a [museum](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.bibleplaces.com/us-museums-artifacts-biblical-world/&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1748367712641153&usg=AOvVaw0rhMobIU0hSuu13wR5ZW0Z) that houses artifacts from Ancient Israel.
[ ] (New Testament) Create a "[Resurrection Garden.](https://seedskidsworship.com/resurrection-garden/)" (These can also be used as centerpieces for Easter dinner.)
[ ] (New Testament) Spend time fishing as a family and try to name all the times fish or fishing are mentioned in this term's readings.
[ ] (New Testament) Finish your "picture biography" of Jesus using your own brush drawings or fine art prints.
